title: 8 Herbal Teas to Help Older Adults with Inflamed Gums
description: Salvia officinalis teas have been used for centuries to help with inflamed gums, and for good reason. The tea contains compounds like tannins, flavonoids, and rosmarinic acid, which have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. These properties help reduce swelling and fight off bacteria that can cause gum inflammation.
